description:
A colleague has prepared a GMAT mission script for a new 550 km altitude sun-synchronous dawn-dusk communications satellite (LeoComm-1) at /home/ga/Documents/missions/leo_comms_mission.script, but it contains physically inconsistent parameters. Ensure the mission script is physically valid for the target orbit, propagated for 7 days, and successfully executed via GmatConsole. Document the corrected parameters in a diagnosis report at /home/ga/GMAT_output/leo_diagnosis_report.txt with the following exact lines:
SMA_corrected_km: <value>
ECC_corrected: <value>
INC_corrected_deg: <value>
DragArea_corrected_m2: <value>
RAAN_drift
